sub_problems: Define LLM 'inherited errors' analogous to manuscript copyist errors: specific token-pattern signatures shared across descendants.
Adapt the stemmatic method to LLM outputs: shared errors → shared ancestry; conjectural emendation → reconstruction of intermediate checkpoints.
Test that recovered stemma matches known model lineages in test families (e.g., Llama → Llama-Instruct → various fine-tunes).
